word: H4241 - מִחְיָה - michyâh - mikh-yaw' - Preserve life

sections.paragraph:
Original: מחיה

Transliteration: michyâh

Phonetic: mikh-yaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. preservation of life, sustenance
    1. preservation of life
    2. sustenance
    3. reviving
    4. the quick of the flesh, live flesh, tender or raw flesh

Origin: from H2421

TWOT entry: 644h

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
